message:
fix(nav): replace deprecated Page.goBack/goForward with navigateToHistoryEntry

- Chrome removed Page.goBack and Page.goForward from DevTools Protocol
- Implement navigation using Page.getNavigationHistory + Page.navigateToHistoryEntry
- Route navigation commands through browser-level pipe instead of page WebSocket
- Add debug logging to trace CDP commands and responses
- Add WebSocket keepalive pings and connection closed detection
- Increase WebSocket discovery timeout for slow Chrome startup
- Fix toolbar button overlap when switching between refresh/stop icons

files.patch:
